sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ لُبْنَى فِي مَطْعَمٍ وَتَخْدِمُ الزَّبَائِنَ.
sentences.translation: Lubna radi u restoranu i usluţuje goste.
sentences.translationEn: Lubna works in a restaurant and serves customers.

sentences.arabic: تَأْخُذُ الطَّلَبَاتِ وَتُوصِلُ الطَّعَامَ إِلَى الطِّاوِلَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Prima narudžbe i donosi hranu do stolova.
sentences.translationEn: She takes orders and delivers food to the tables.

sentences.arabic: تَبْتَسِمُ دَائِمًا وَتَتَكَلَّمُ مَعَ الزَّبَائِنِ بِلُطْفٍ.
sentences.translation: Uvijek se smiješi i razgovara s gostima ljubazno.
sentences.translationEn: She always smiles and talks to customers kindly.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهَا زَبُونٌ سَعِيدٌ مَبْلَغًا إِضَافِيًّا شُكْرًا لَهَا.
sentences.translation: Zadovoljni gost joj je dao dodatni iznos kao zahvalnost.
sentences.translationEn: A happy customer gave her an extra amount as thanks.
